questions.question: Explain the concept of distributed mutual exclusion in the context of distributed systems. Provide an example to illustrate this concept. (10 marks)
What is the difference between a semaphore and a mutex in a distributed system? Provide an example of each. (8 marks)
Describe the algorithm used in the Banker's algorithm for resolving conflicts in a distributed system. What are the advantages and disadvantages of this algorithm? (15 marks)
